text.title: Design System Success Factors Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying design-system-success-factors; each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Multiple PMs co-own the system; no one rejects bad PRs; system bloats.
antipattern.fix: Name single accountable owner with veto authority; co-owners advise.

antipattern.symptom: Docs site shows v2 API; code is v4; new contributors waste days.
antipattern.root-cause: Hand-written docs not regenerated on release.
antipattern.fix: Generate docs from Storybook + JSDoc on every release; CI fails if generated docs differ from committed.

antipattern.symptom: Leadership thinks system has 90% adoption; per-team measurement reveals 45% in billing.
antipattern.fix: Add bundler analytics: per-team % imports from system; publish quarterly.
